source_prompt: 어떻게 수행해 나갈지 전체 구현 흐름 이런 거를 다 설계하고 실제 너가 수행까지 다 해

activation.reason: The work spans authoring context, critique, candidate review/ranking, loop checkpoints, docs, fixtures, and verification gates.

objective: Implement a read-only humanizer/editorial narrative layer for figure-agent without adding hidden prompt loops, external vision/API calls, autonomous source mutation, or rank-scoring authority.

assumptions.claim: The first safe implementation slice is context-pack integration only.
assumptions.verification_step: Run tests/test_authoring_context_pack.py before touching critique, candidate ranking, or loop files.

assumptions.claim: The layer should be named narrative_context in machine payloads while documented as the humanizer/editorial layer.
assumptions.verification_step: Review JSON schema names and docs for no hidden designer authority.

assumptions.claim: Additive fields can remain under figure-agent.authoring-context-pack.v1.
assumptions.verification_step: Ensure existing context-pack tests and downstream JSON consumers pass unchanged.

phases.entry_criteria: Existing authoring context tests are readable and no blocker questions remain.
phases.exit_criteria: context-pack JSON emits narrative_context, remains read-only, and targeted tests pass.
critique brief and candidate review packet expose source-anchored narrative context as advisory evidence only.
ranking score is proven unchanged by narrative fields and fig_loop checkpoints expose advisory summary without changing stop decisions.
phases.output: ranking non-influence and loop advisory tests

phases.exit_criteria: operator docs describe read-only boundaries and targeted pytest/ruff verification passes.
phases.output: docs, verification logs, and closeout report

workers.role: Implement first read-only narrative_context compiler slice.
forbidden_actions: Call external APIs or model services

workers.role: Refute claims that the layer is read-only, source-anchored, and non-authoritative.
forbidden_actions: Accept producer claims without source evidence

artifact_schema.validation_command: cd plugins/figure-agent && uv run pytest tests/test_authoring_context_pack.py -q
cd plugins/figure-agent && uv run pytest tests/test_candidate_rank.py tests/test_fig_loop.py -q

parallelism.shape: pipeline with fan-out after context compiler
parallelism.fan_in_rule: Critique and candidate review integrations may run in parallel after phase 1; ranking/loop/docs wait for verified phase handoffs.

verification.falsifier: Snapshot fixture files before and after context-pack CLI execution.
verification.evidence_required: pytest assertion over file content snapshot

verification.claim_or_output: narrative_context does not perform model/API calls
verification.falsifier: Inspect implementation for network/subprocess/model-call imports and run ruff/tests.

verification.claim_or_output: narrative_context does not change rank scoring or loop decisions
verification.falsifier: Compare candidate rank scores and fig_loop stop fields with and without narrative fields.

risk_gates.trigger: Any source mutation outside tests or explicit apply command
risk_gates.safe_default: Stop and preserve generated evidence without applying changes.

risk_gates.trigger: Any external API, model call, or paid/remote vision dependency
risk_gates.safe_default: Do not add the dependency; keep the layer source-anchored and read-only.

risk_gates.trigger: Changing candidate rank_score or fig_loop stop decisions
risk_gates.safe_default: Keep narrative data advisory-only and stop the wave.

budget.model_budget: Use quick workers for local slices; use verifier only after implementation.

invalidation_rules: Rerun phase 1 if authoring_context_pack.py or narrative_context.py changes.
Rerun downstream phases if narrative_context schema changes.

first_slice.instruction: Implement only the context-pack narrative_context compiler slice, with red tests first and no critique/ranking/loop changes.
first_slice.expected_output: narrative_context payload in context-pack JSON and passing targeted tests
first_slice.completion_check: cd plugins/figure-agent && uv run pytest tests/test_authoring_context_pack.py -q

slices.instruction: Add tests and implementation for read-only narrative_context in context-pack only.

first_wave.entry_gate: Plan Agent approved first slice and Python reference loaded.
first_wave.exit_gate: pytest and ruff pass for first-slice files.

waves.entry_gate: wave-1-context-pack exit gate passed with narrative_context schema stable.
waves.exit_gate: critique and candidate review tests pass; narrative remains advisory-only.

waves.entry_gate: wave-2 outputs verified and no hidden authority introduced.
waves.exit_gate: targeted pytest, ruff, and adversarial verification pass.
